taxonomy: Litogyne gariepina is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Proteaceae. It belongs to the genus Litogyne, which is a group of plants endemic to southern Africa. Litogyne gariepina is further categorized as a member of the order Proteales, a group of flowering plants that are primarily found in the Southern Hemisphere. This plant's classification is based on its morphological and anatomical characteristics, as well as its genetic makeup. By understanding its classification, researchers can better understand the evolutionary relationships between Litogyne gariepina and other related plant species.
